exploration_notes: Fixed 4 files: (1) unknown.go - added nil check for renderer.before.Renderer to prevent nil pointer dereference when a computed attribute transitions from null to unknown during update; (2) block.go - changed 3 locations where unknown blocks used hardcoded plans.Create to instead pass through diff.Action, so update/replace actions render with correct ~ marker; (3) renderer_test.go - added computed_update_from_null test case covering the null-to-unknown update scenario; (4) plan_test.go - updated
